definition:
1. a lookout-place, a mountain-peak , (Homer): of the Trojan acropolis, (Euripides): compare σκόπελος. 
2. metaphorically the height  or highest point  of anything, (Pindar) 
3. a watchtower , Lat. specula, (Herdotus Historicus) 
4. a look-out, watch , σκοπιὴν ἔχειν to keep watch , (Odyssey by Homer) (ML)
